name: Arlington Fitness
description: Arlington Fitness Pickleball offers a premier sports experience with its two state-of-the-art indoor courts, perfect for singles, doubles, and group events. The facility is designed to cater to players of all levels, providing a vibrant and engaging environment for pickleball enthusiasts.In addition to the courts, members can enjoy a well-equipped fitness area to complement their training. After a match, you can relax and refuel at the full-service Mi So Happy Ramen and Thai restaurant, which features a variety of flavorful, healthy food and drink options. For all your pickleball needs, the pro shop is stocked with equipment and accessories, ensuring that you have everything necessary to enhance your game. Arlington Fitness Pickleball truly has it all for fitness lovers and pickleball fans alike!
open_play_schedule: Call to reserve courts during open hours of operation.
fees: Fee required — First, call (901) 402-8397 to reserve court day/time. Second, go to reservation link and purchase drop in and sign waiver. Third, enjoy playing pickleball!

name: Balmoral Baptist Church
description: Balmoral Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Memphis, TN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Bartlett YMCA
description: Bartlett YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Bartlett, TN. There are 3 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, lights, locker rooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

description: Come play pickleball at Bert Ferguson Community Center in Cordova, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Bluff City Pickleball
description:
Bluff City Pickleball: Your Premier Indoor Pickleball Destination in Memphis! We offer eight pickleball courts, a dedicated practice court with an ERNE Pickleball Machine, a pro shop, and a comfortable mezzanine clubhouse with an observation deck.

Join our vibrant pickleball community! Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting out, we have something for everyone. Participate in open play, reserve court time, or improve your skills with clinics, lessons, and leagues.

Our friendly staff is always happy to answer your questions and get you started. Pickleball isn't just a game, it's a community. Experience the fun and camaraderie at Bluff City Pickleball! 

Call us at (901) 582-9888.

name: Pickleball Kingdom Memphis - Germantown
description: Pickleball Kingdom Memphis – Germantown offers 17 indoor dedicated courts with reservable play, a pro shop, lessons, youth and adaptive programs, and full amenities. New players can join a FREE 1-hour intro class with all equipment provided—just bring shoes. Members enjoy unlimited play, free reservations, waived fees, locker access, and ball machine discounts. The facility also hosts corporate events, birthday parties, and more with court rentals and on-site catering.
